title: Introduction to Programming and Python Basics
description: Learn the basics of programming using Python. We cover variables, loops, conditionals, and basic functions in this beginner-friendly tutorial.

title: Data Structures: Arrays and Linked Lists
description: An essential guide to memory management, arrays, time complexity, and singly vs doubly linked lists. Implement them step-by-step.

title: Binary Search Basics and Iterative Implementation
description: Master the binary search algorithm, its time complexity O(log N), and why it requires sorted arrays. Solve basic array search problems.

title: Advanced Binary Search on Answer Space
description: Learn to solve complex problems like Book Allocation, Aggressive Cows, and finding Peak Elements using Binary Search on Answer.

title: Introduction to Trees and Binary Tree Traversals
description: Understand hierarchical data structures. Explore Binary Trees and learn Inorder, Preorder, and Postorder traversal algorithms recursively.

title: Binary Search Trees (BST) and Heap Operations
description: Learn the properties of Binary Search Trees, insertion, deletion, and heap priority queues. Analyze time complexity of search operations.

title: Graph Theory: Representations, BFS, and DFS
description: Understand graphs, adjacency lists vs matrices, and how to traverse them using Breadth First Search (BFS) and Depth First Search (DFS).

title: Dynamic Programming (DP): Memoization and Tabulation
description: Demystify Dynamic Programming. Learn how to identify DP problems, write overlapping subproblem solutions, and optimize from recursive to iterative.

title: Advanced Dynamic Programming on Trees and Graphs
description: Master complex DP concepts, including Tree DP, rerouting techniques, and state space optimization on graph traversals.

title: Machine Learning Foundations and Linear Regression
description: Introduction to supervised learning. Learn the mathematical formulation of Linear Regression, cost function, and gradient descent.

title: Neural Networks and Backpropagation Explained
description: Build an intuition for deep learning. Learn how artificial neural networks work, activation functions, and the backpropagation math.

title: Transformers Architecture and Large Language Models
description: Dive deep into the Transformer model, self-attention mechanisms, encoder-decoder blocks, and how modern LLMs are trained.

title: Interstellar - Space Exploration Masterpiece
description: A team of explorers travel through a wormhole in space in an attempt to ensure humanity's survival. Directed by Christopher Nolan.

title: Inception - Mind-Bending Dream Heist
description: A thief who steals corporate secrets through the use of dream-sharing technology is given the inverse task of planting an idea into the mind of a C.E.O.

title: The Martian - Survival on the Red Planet
description: An astronaut becomes stranded on Mars after his crew assumes him dead, and must rely on his ingenuity to find a way to signal to Earth.

title: Gravity - Lost in Orbit Thriller
description: Two astronauts work together to survive after an accident leaves them stranded in space with no connection to Earth. Starring Sandra Bullock.

title: Arrival - First Contact and Linguistics
description: A linguist works with the military to communicate with alien lifelike spacecraft that have landed across the globe, uncovering a deeper secret of time.

title: Tenet - Temporal Inversion Action
description: Armed with only one word, Tenet, and fighting for the survival of the entire world, a Protagonist journeys through a twilight world of international espionage.

title: The Dark Knight - Iconic Superhero Drama
description: When the menace known as the Joker wreaks havoc and chaos on the people of Gotham, Batman must accept one of the greatest psychological and physical tests.

title: Memento - Backward Narrative Crime Mystery
description: A man with short-term memory loss attempts to track down his wife's murderer, utilizing polaroids and tattoos to reconstruct his life.

title: Shutter Island - Psychological Isolation Mystery
description: In 1954, a U.S. Marshal investigates the disappearance of a murderer who escaped from a hospital for the criminally insane on Shutter Island.
